steps.title: DMEM/F12+ (already contains sodium pyruvate and glutamax) Anti-anti N2 B27
steps.instruction: DMEM/F12+ (already contains sodium pyruvate and glutamax) Anti-anti N2 B27

steps.title: BrainPhys BDNF GDNF cAMP Ascorbic Acid...
steps.instruction: BrainPhys BDNF GDNF cAMP Ascorbic Acid N2 B27 Mouse laminin Sodium Pyruvate Glutamax Anti-anti

steps.title: Harvest iPSCs by incubating in 1mL...
steps.instruction: Harvest iPSCs by incubating in 1mL per well Accutase at 37 degrees C for at least 5-10 minutes. Max of 20 minutes

steps.title: Resuspend the iPSCs in the accutase...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the iPSCs in the accutase in each well and then mix in a 50mL falcon tube with at least 1:3 volumetric ratio of room temp. DMEM

steps.title: Spin for 5 minutes (Sam likes...
steps.instruction: Spin for 5 minutes (Sam likes 6 b/c he’s paranoid and it makes him feel better) at RT at 800g

steps.title: Aspirate supernatant and resuspend pellet in...
steps.instruction: Aspirate supernatant and resuspend pellet in 1 mL of Stemflex with 1:1000 rock inhibitor THX. Count. Dilute in Stemflex with THX to a cell suspension concentration of 1e6 cells/mL

steps.title: Add the appropriate amount of Ascl1-PuroR,...
steps.instruction: Add the appropriate amount of Ascl1-PuroR, Dlx2-HygroR, and rTTA viruses A safe amount to add of each is 50 uL per 1e6 cells (and therefore 50uL of each per 10mL) of suspension for Sam’s current aliquots of virus

steps.title: Mix well by inversion and gentle,...
steps.instruction: Mix well by inversion and gentle, repeated pipetting with a large strip pipet

steps.title: Dispense 1
steps.instruction: Dispense 1.0-1.5 mL of suspension per well (6 well size) coated with 1x matrigel

steps.title: Incubate in incubator overnight (min 12 hours; max 36 hours)
steps.instruction: Incubate in incubator overnight (min 12 hours; max 36 hours)

steps.title: DIV1
steps.instruction: DIV1: aspirate the media in the virus hood and replace with Induction media with Dox 1ug/mL

steps.title: DIV2
steps.instruction: DIV2: replace media with Induction media with dox (1ug/mL), puromycin (2ug/mL), and hygromycin (250ug/mL which means 1:250 dilution in the media with our aliquots)

steps.title: DIV3
steps.instruction: DIV3: only if there is a significant amount of cell death, repeat step from DIV2

steps.title: DIV4
steps.instruction: DIV4: Start AraC 4uM treatment on this day. Continue puromycin 2ug/mL and hygromycin 250ug/mL until DIV6

steps.title: DIV6
steps.instruction: DIV6: harvest by incubating in 1mL Accutase at 37degrees for 5 minutes. Gently resuspend in the well with the Accutase so it break up clumps. Quench with at least 1:3 DMEM. Spin for 5mins at RT at 800g. Resuspend pellet in 1mL of Neuron media with Dox 1ug/mL, puromycin 2ug/mL, hygromycin 250ug/mL, AraC 4uM, and THX 1:1000. Count. Dilute to a concentration of 1e6 cells/mL. Mix well but gently by inversion and pipetting with large pipet. Dispense 2-4 million cells per well (and therefore 2-4mL of the suspension) on either 0.1% PEI + 2x matrigel OR 4x matrigel-coated plates

steps.title: DIV7
steps.instruction: DIV7: replace media with neuron+Dox 1ug/mL +AraC 4uM

steps.title: DIV8
steps.instruction: DIV8: at this time you may stop AraC, so replace media accordingly Note: if there is still a concern about flat cells, the AraC can be continued up until DIV14 at the latest. In those cases, I often will decrease it to 2uM AraC at DIV8 and keep until DIV14

steps.title: DIV10
steps.instruction: DIV10: repeat step from DIV8. Note, you may continue using AraC at this time

steps.title: DIV12
steps.instruction: DIV12: repeat step from DIV10

steps.title: DIV14
steps.instruction: DIV14: replace media with just neuron media WITHOUT dox or AraC

steps.title: Perform ½ media changes 3 times...
steps.instruction: Perform ½ media changes 3 times a week or full media changes twice a week until desired time point for harvest Note: Sam typically harvests iGABA at DIV35
